name: Smeek
description_en: Smeek was one of the security guards at Sett's arena in Navori. Despite his grumpy demeanor, Smeek took his job very seriously and would not let anyone in unless they had received an invitation.
description_fr: Smeek était l'un des gardes de sécurité de l'arène Sett à Navori. Malgré son air grincheux, Smeek prenait son travail très au sérieux et ne laissait entrer personne à moins d'avoir reçu une invitation.
